hero.title: AI-Powered Medical Meta-Analysis
hero.subtitle: Enter medical keywords and get instant AI-powered meta-analysis summaries from 40M+ PubMed papers.
hero.step1Desc: Type medical terms, drug names, or conditions you want to investigate.
hero.step2Desc: Our system searches 40M+ papers to find the most relevant studies.
hero.step3Desc: AI reads the abstracts and generates a structured meta-analysis summary.
hero.step4Desc: Receive key findings with source citations and links to original papers.
hero.popularDesc: Explore AI-powered comparisons of commonly compared medications.

results.title: Analysis Results
results.disclaimer: This is an AI-generated summary for informational purposes only. It is NOT medical advice. Always consult a healthcare professional.

footer.feedback: Have a suggestion? Let us know

about.title: About MetaLens AI
about.missionText: MetaLens AI was created by SPINAI to democratize access to medical research insights. We believe every healthcare professional, student, and researcher should be able to quickly synthesize evidence from thousands of papers.
about.howWeWorkText: We leverage PubMed's database of 40M+ papers and advanced AI to deliver structured meta-analysis summaries in seconds — not hours.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Text: Type in medical terms, drug names, conditions, or any research keywords you want to investigate.
howItWorks.step2Text: Our system searches PubMed's 40M+ papers to find the most relevant studies for your query.
howItWorks.step3Text: Advanced AI reads the abstracts and synthesizes a structured meta-analysis summary with key findings.
howItWorks.step4Text: Receive a concise summary with source citations and links to the original papers.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! MetaLens AI offers a free tier with 5 analyses per day. Pro and Team plans are available for power users.
faq.q2: Where does the data come from?
faq.a2: All research data comes from PubMed, the world's largest biomedical literature database maintained by the National Library of Medicine.
faq.a3: No. MetaLens AI provides AI-generated research summaries for informational purposes only. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical decisions.
faq.a4: Our AI synthesizes findings directly from peer-reviewed abstracts. While we strive for accuracy, AI can make mistakes. Always verify findings with the original sources.
faq.a5: MetaLens AI automatically detects your browser language and supports English, Korean, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, Portuguese, German, and French.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
Last updated: March 2026

MetaLens AI by SPINAI respects your privacy.

1. Data Collection: We collect minimal anonymous usage data (search keywords, browser language, paper count) to improve our service. No personally identifiable information (PII) is collected or stored.

2. Search Queries: Your search keywords are sent to PubMed (NIH) and our AI provider for processing. Queries are not stored on our servers after processing.

3. Cookies: We do not use tracking cookies. A random session ID is generated per visit for analytics only.

4. Third-Party Services: We use PubMed (NCBI/NIH) for research data and Pollinations.ai for AI synthesis. These services have their own privacy policies.

5. Data Storage: We may log anonymous, aggregated usage statistics via Google Sheets for product improvement.

6. Children: This service is not intended for children under 13.

7. Changes: We may update this policy. Changes will be posted on this page.

Contact: taeshinkim11@gmail.com

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
Last updated: March 2026

By using MetaLens AI, you agree to the following terms:

1. Nature of Service: MetaLens AI provides AI-generated summaries of publicly available PubMed research abstracts. Results are for informational and educational purposes only.

2. Not Medical Advice: Nothing on this site constitutes medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment recommendations. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional before making medical decisions.

3. Accuracy: While we strive for accuracy, AI can produce errors, hallucinations, or misinterpretations. Always verify findings with the original source papers.

4. Limitation of Liability: SPINAI is not liable for any decisions, actions, or outcomes based on the information provided by MetaLens AI.

5. Fair Use: Free tier users may perform up to 5 analyses per day. Automated scraping or abuse of the service is prohibited.

6. Intellectual Property: The MetaLens AI name, logo, and design are property of SPINAI. Research abstracts are sourced from PubMed/NCBI and are subject to their terms.

7. Changes: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time.

Contact: taeshinkim11@gmail.com

errors.noResults: No papers found for these keywords. Try different or broader terms.
errors.apiError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.rateLimit: You've reached the daily limit. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited analyses.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
